description: Composition Green string bikini made of poly-cotton no hole plated mesh fabric, has a durable signature logo centered waistband, reinforced fabric covered rubber leg bands, contrast stitch detailing and printed label on the inner Fitting Low rise Wash care Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry cleanable This low-rise tanga cut bikini from facit is crafted using poly-cotton mesh fabric that provides quick dry comfort. The low-rise tanga cut allows free leg movement, while the printed label on the inside offers abrasion-free comfort. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 28"
